subject: An elf druid channeling swirling green magical energy in a forest
description: An elf figure — pointed ears clearly visible — stands in a dynamic leaning-back pose with arms outstretched, surrounded by sweeping spiraling tendrils of green magical energy. The figure wears dark earth-toned clothing with wrapped forearms and appears to be directing or riding the magical current rather than casting it outward. The forest background shows autumn foliage in orange and red tones. The ground is carpeted with fallen leaves. The magical energy curls in loose spiral forms throughout the composition, giving the whole image a sense of organic rhythm and flow.
foreground: elf figure in dark clothing, surrounded by swirling green energy tendrils
background: autumn forest with orange and red foliage, fallen leaves
emotion: ecstatic or transcendent — body arched back, arms open wide
